objective: Refactor renderer by responsibility while preserving public root imports through compatibility wrappers. Planned topology: cpu/ owns software rendering formulas/iterators/isolate/tile worker/widget; validation/ owns render frame checks and convergence detection; policy/ owns backend and deep-zoom precision decisions; future widgets/ should own FractalRenderer, canvas, shader loading/error UI, and gesture mixins; providers/ remains controller state management.
completedSlices: Moved CPU rendering files to cpu/ with root export wrappers: cpu_formulas.dart, cpu_iterators.dart, cpu_render_isolate.dart, cpu_tile_worker.dart, cpu_fractal_renderer.dart.
Moved validation files to validation/ with root export wrappers: render_validation.dart, convergence_detector.dart.
Moved policy files to policy/ with root export wrappers: backend_policy.dart, deep_zoom_precision_policy.dart.
Updated cpu/cpu_fractal_renderer.dart to import local cpu and validation modules directly instead of routing through root compatibility wrappers.
nextCandidates: Move fractal_renderer.dart, fractal_canvas.dart, fractal_painter.dart, gesture_handler.dart, shader_loader.dart into a widgets/ subfolder with a root fractal_renderer.dart export wrapper, preserving part files and public imports.
